store_headline: Clean Music WordPress Theme for Artists and Bands
store_subheadline: Showcase music, discography, tour dates, and merch with a light, content-first design.
features: Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Portfolio custom post type with advanced filtering
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
selling_points: The light counterpart to every dark music theme — Kayo lets the music speak, not the design
White-space-heavy editorial layouts borrowed from music press, not generic web templates
Three distinct clean homepage configurations in one purchase — pick the one that fits
The only general-purpose music theme in the catalog built around restraint, not impact
Full music feature set — discography, events, audio, video, merch — without visual noise competing with your art
Built for indie, folk, and singer-songwriter audiences who find dark themes out of step with their identity
Built with WPBakery and Slider Revolution — the page-builder stack proven on thousands of music sites
key_benefits: Clean design stays out of the way so music leads
Discography, video archive, and tour calendar in editorial magazine layouts
Sell merch without a visual identity that contradicts your sound
Stand apart as the anti-dark-theme in any music theme search
Three pre-built homepages ready to switch as your project evolves
Tour dates, new releases, and press quotes in one scrollable page
design_features: Clean typography and minimalist color schemes
Light, airy layout with ample white space
Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: Great theme, with many useful features - yet easy to use and great customer support when needed!
testimonials.author: gwenaellelecorre

testimonials.text: Love this theme! I'm still working on it and having some questions here and there, but the Customer Support team answers them in timely manner and explains it clearly. Very helpful for a beginner like me. I can't wait to finish it :)
testimonials.author: mmorita1

testimonials.text: Excellent theme. Very professional and very clean. And Customer Support was very helpful.
testimonials.author: Amalhado
